response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple domains, including test automation, CI/CD, and developer tooling, with clear evidence of hands-on contributions to productivity infrastructure — but lacks explicit people management experience and mobile platform focus, which are key for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators) and automation infrastructure.
Proven track record in test-driven development, CI/CD, and promoting engineering best practices across teams.
Active open-source contributions and knowledge sharing through workshops, aligning with productivity culture.
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentoring.
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as required.
Current role is individual contributor; no documented organizational change or roadmap ownership.
